rationale: Acting on Review 1 yields the better PR because it additionally fixes the inaccurate AlgPoints docstring (which claims k-points of affine alg groups but defines a standalone general A →ₐ[k] k with mismatched variables/assumptions), a real documentation mismatch grounded in the diff that maintainers would want corrected; both reviews correctly flag the identical ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup/theorem placeholder overclaims, but Review 2 misses the extra issue and thus leaves worse docs.
